supply_chain.dependencies: Dependent on limited number of aircraft and engine manufacturers (Airbus, Boeing). Regional carrier operations depend on third-party contract carriers. Monroe refinery sources crude oil from domestic and foreign providers.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints from aircraft manufacturers affecting delivery schedules. Dependence on third-party regional carriers for connectivity. Fuel supply disruptions could impact operations. Aircraft and engine manufacturer defects or regulatory groundings could materially affect operations.

regulatory_risks: FAA regulations and directives on aircraft maintenance and operations requiring significant expenditures
DOT jurisdiction over economic and consumer protection matters, joint venture approvals
International route authorities subject to bilateral agreements and foreign government policies
Airport slot regulations and capacity restrictions at slot-controlled airports (Reagan National, LaGuardia, JFK, London Heathrow)
TSA and Customs and Border Protection security requirements
Environmental regulations including greenhouse gas emissions (CORSIA, EU ETS, UK ETS)
EPA aircraft emission standards and certification requirements
SAF mandates in EU (2% by 2025, increasing to 70% by 2050) and UK
Noise regulations and airport flight reduction plans (e.g., Amsterdam Schiphol)
PFAS regulations under CERCLA and Safe Drinking Water Act
Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) and RINs purchase requirements for refinery
Data privacy and security laws (U.S. and foreign jurisdictions)
Antitrust regulations affecting joint ventures and commercial arrangements
Railway Labor Act governing labor relations
Environmental laws governing hazardous substances, waste management, emissions

sanction_risks: Trade sanctions and restrictions could impact international operations
Geopolitical conflicts requiring avoidance of certain airspace
Targeting of commercial aircraft by parties to geopolitical conflicts
DOT tentative dismissal of Aeroméxico joint cooperation agreement antitrust immunity renewal (pending adjudication)
Netherlands flight reduction plan at Amsterdam Schiphol Airport (legal challenges ongoing)
